---
title: "Clubul Computer"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "A community-driven technology club for all ages"
description: "Join Clubul Computer, a community-driven technology club offering programming workshops, meetups, and hands-on learning for all ages."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:65vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy Program</div>
    <h1>Clubul<br>Computer</h1>
    <p>A community-driven tech club. Learn, build, and share — all ages, all levels, zero fees.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://clubul.computer" target="_blank" class="ev-btn" style="background:#F5A623;">Visit clubul.computer</a>
      <a href="#join" class="ev-btn-ghost">Join the club</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">150+</div><div class="m-nl">Schools reached</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">5000+</div><div class="m-nl">Students</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">25</div><div class="m-nl">IoT sensors deployed</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">Free</div><div class="m-nl">Always</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROGRAMS -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>What we do</h2>
    <p class="sub">Six programs for every interest and skill level.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/workshops" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Workshops"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Workshops</h3><p>Python, web dev, JavaScript — beginner to advanced.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/talks" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Tech Talks"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Tech Talks</h3><p>Industry speakers on open source, AI ethics, cybersecurity.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/junior" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Junior Club"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Junior Club</h3><p>Game dev, robot programming, and digital storytelling for ages 8-14.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/hacking" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Hardware Hacking"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Hardware Hacking</h3><p>Arduino, Raspberry Pi, IoT devices, and 3D printing.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/open-source" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Open Source"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Open Source</h3><p>Find projects, understand codebases, make real contributions.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/incubator" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Project Incubator"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Project Incubator</h3><p>Turn your idea into reality with mentorship and resources.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE ROW 1 -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Club meetup"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Technology for<br>everyone.</h2>
        <p>No fees. No requirements. Just show up. Whether you're 8 or 80, a complete beginner or a senior developer — Clubul Computer is your space to learn, experiment, and connect with people who share your curiosity.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="https://clubul.computer" target="_blank" class="m-lk">Visit clubul.computer</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE ROW 2 -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Coding session"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Real projects.<br>Real impact.</h2>
        <p>Our members build educational tools used in 150+ Romanian schools, deploy air quality sensors across cities, and contribute to open-source projects used worldwide. This isn't a classroom — it's a launchpad.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="https://www.clubul.computer/t/open-source" target="_blank" class="m-lk">See community projects</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FIND US -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:6rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Find us</h2>
    <p class="sub">Show up. That's all it takes.</p>
    <div style="max-width:750px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><span style="color:#fff;">Craiova, Romania</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Main location. Last Thursday of every month.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Monthly</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-building" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><span style="color:#fff;">Bucharest</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Satellite meetups. Quarterly.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-soon">Quarterly</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-camera-video" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><span style="color:#fff;">Online</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Virtual meetups and workshops. Join from anywhere.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Always</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><a href="mailto:social@clubul.computer">social@clubul.computer</a></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Questions, ideas, or just want to say hi.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PARTNERSHIP APPLICATION -->
<div class="m-s" id="apply" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:950px;">
    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1.2fr; gap:3rem; align-items:start;">

      <!-- Left: info -->
      <div>
        <i class="bi bi-handshake" style="font-size:2rem; color:#F5A623; display:block; margin-bottom:1rem;"></i>
        <h2 style="font-size:1.75rem; text-align:left; margin-bottom:1rem;">Start a Computer Club in your organization</h2>
        <p style="color:#86868b; line-height:1.6; margin-bottom:2rem;">We help you launch and run your own Computer Club chapter. We provide the curriculum, mentorship framework, and community platform — you provide the space and enthusiasm.</p>

        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1.25rem;">
          <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:0.75rem;">
            <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:40px; height:40px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:10px;">
              <i class="bi bi-building" style="color:#F5A623;"></i>
            </div>
            <div><div style="font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Companies</div><div style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#86868b;">Employee upskilling, team building, and innovation culture</div></div>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:0.75rem;">
            <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:40px; height:40px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:10px;">
              <i class="bi bi-mortarboard" style="color:#F5A623;"></i>
            </div>
            <div><div style="font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Schools</div><div style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#86868b;">Extracurricular STEM programs and digital literacy</div></div>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:0.75rem;">
            <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:40px; height:40px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:10px;">
              <i class="bi bi-bank" style="color:#F5A623;"></i>
            </div>
            <div><div style="font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Universities</div><div style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#86868b;">Student tech communities and research groups</div></div>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:0.75rem;">
            <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:40px; height:40px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:10px;">
              <i class="bi bi-heart" style="color:#F5A623;"></i>
            </div>
            <div><div style="font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">NGOs</div><div style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#86868b;">Digital literacy and community empowerment</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Right: form -->
      <div class="m-form">
        <div style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.04); border:1.5px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.12); border-radius:20px; padding:2.5rem;">
          <h3 style="font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:0.35rem; text-align:center;">Apply to start a chapter</h3>
          <p style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#86868b; text-align:center; margin-bottom:1.75rem;">Fill in the form and we'll get back to you within 48 hours.</p>
          <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mpwkaqev" method="POST">
            <div class="fr">
              <div class="fg">
                <label>Your Name *</label>
                <input type="text" name="name" required placeholder="Full name">
              </div>
              <div class="fg">
                <label>Email *</label>
                <input type="email" name="email" required placeholder="your@email.com">
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Organization *</label>
              <input type="text" name="organization" required placeholder="Company, school, or organization name">
            </div>
            <div class="fr">
              <div class="fg">
                <label>Type *</label>
                <select name="org_type" required>
                  <option value="">Select...</option>
                  <option value="company">Company</option>
                  <option value="school">School (K-12)</option>
                  <option value="university">University</option>
                  <option value="ngo">NGO / Nonprofit</option>
                  <option value="community">Community Group</option>
                  <option value="other">Other</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div class="fg">
                <label>City / Country *</label>
                <input type="text" name="location" required placeholder="e.g. Berlin, Germany">
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Expected participants</label>
              <select name="participants">
                <option value="">Select...</option>
                <option value="5-15">5–15 people</option>
                <option value="15-30">15–30 people</option>
                <option value="30-50">30–50 people</option>
                <option value="50+">50+ people</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Tell us about your vision *</label>
              <textarea name="message" rows="3" required placeholder="What would you like the club to focus on? Who are the participants?"></textarea>
            </div>
            <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="Computer Club Chapter Application">
            <input type="hidden" name="_source" value="computerclub-apply">
            <input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none">
            <div class="fc">
              <input type="checkbox" required>
              <span>I agree to the <a href="/privacy.html" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> *</span>
            </div>
            <button type="submit" style="background:#F5A623;"><i class="bi bi-send me-2"></i>Submit Application</button>
          </form>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta" id="join">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Join the club</h2>
    <p>Show up to a meetup or reach out online. That's it.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://clubul.computer" target="_blank" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">Visit clubul.computer</a>
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-bo" style="border-color:#F5A623; color:#F5A623;">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
